content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Mar 28, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
Today, the team focused on maintenance and addressing existing issues, with several long-standing issues related to plugin validation, error handling, developer experience, and specific plugin integrations being closed. A new pull request was opened to update dependencies, and a significant new issue was raised proposing a policy facilitator for autonomous agent spend governance.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- **Dependency Updates**: A new pull request, [#6694](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6694), was opened to bump the `npm_and_yarn` group across four directories, including three updates, to keep project dependencies current.

## CLOSED ISSUES

- **Plugin Validation and Integration**: Several issues related to the validation and integration of various plugins, including Polygon-related plugins, Alethea, and Polygon-zkevm, were closed. This indicates a successful effort in ensuring these external components function correctly within the ElizaOS framework. ([#5808](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/5808), [#5948](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/5948), [#5951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/5951), [#5952](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/5952))
- **Developer Experience and Error Handling Improvements**: Issues concerning error handling, debugging capabilities, and overall developer experience were addressed and closed. This suggests improvements in the robustness of the system and the ease with which developers can interact with it. ([#5925](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/5925), [#5926](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/5926))

## NEW ISSUES

- **Autonomous Agent Spend Governance**: A new plugin proposal, [#6695](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6695), was created to address the lack of a standard plugin for spend governance when ElizaOS agents hold wallets and spend autonomously via x402. The proposal highlights the problem of agents potentially making unauthorized payments without a policy layer and suggests a pre-authorization layer that sits above the Dreamline call to ensure human operator approval for specific payments.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

- **API Endpoint Not Found**: In issue [#5121](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/5121), the discussion revolves around an API endpoint not found error for `/api/agents/{agentId}/rooms`. The latest comments include a new participant, `majorelalexis-stack`, who introduced MAXIA, an AI-to-AI marketplace, and expressed interest in collaboration or integration. Previous comments clarified that the messaging API has transitioned from "rooms" to "channels" and provided detailed guidance on the correct REST API structure for sending messages to and from agents, including specific endpoints and body formats.
- **Migration ai16z to elizaOS**: Issue [#6535](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6535) discusses a user missing the migration deadline from ai16z to ElizaOS and seeking a solution for token migration from Phantom. The latest comment from `rohmario` indicates that a solution is not yet available, while `marcellv67-beep` also expressed interest in finding a solution to the same problem.
